description.ko: 신경계에서 영감을 얻은 유기적 건축물을 심해의 관점에서 탐구하며, 에메랄드빛 막을 통해 흐르는 생물 발광 수액의 움직임에 집중합니다.
description.en: A deep-sea biological exploration of neural-inspired organic architecture, focusing on the flow of bioluminescent sap through emerald membranes.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Myelin Cascade.' A macro perspective of a massive, pulsating organic network where #7FB069 emerald moss-membranes form intricate neural-like pathways. The structure is submerged in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid, exhaling swirling #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar that moves like liquid electricity through semi-permeable cellular walls. Deep #2D5A3D dark forest vascular structures anchor the composition, creating a sense of ancient biological depth. Macro cinematography focus on the rhythmic expansion of translucent capillary systems. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, serene and divine organic movement.
